source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Assistant: Hello, this is Preston Community Centre.
segments.translation: 你好，这里是普雷斯顿社区中心。

segments.text: Man: Oh, hello.
segments.translation: 哦，你好。

segments.text: Man: My name's Andrew Shepherd.
segments.translation: 我叫安德鲁·谢泼德。

segments.text: Man: I'm ringing about the classes you offer.
segments.translation: 我打电话是想问问你们开的课程。

segments.text: Assistant: OK, Mr. Shepherd.
segments.translation: 好的，谢泼德先生。

segments.text: Assistant: Are there any classes in particular that you're interested in?
segments.translation: 您有没有特别感兴趣的课程呢？

segments.text: Man: Yes, you've got a class called Photography, I believe?
segments.translation: 有的，我记得你们有一门叫摄影的课，对吧？

segments.text: Assistant: That's right.
segments.translation: 没错。

segments.text: Assistant: It's the first time we offer this class because many people enquired about it last term.
segments.translation: 这是我们第一次开这门课，因为上学期很多人来打听。

segments.text: Assistant: It'll be held in a library not far from our community centre.
segments.translation: 课会在离社区中心不远的一个图书馆里上。

segments.text: Man: Right.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Man: I know it's on the weekend, right?
segments.translation: 我知道是在周末上，对吧？

segments.text: Assistant: Yes, it's on Saturday, and it will occupy the whole morning.
segments.translation: 对，在周六，而且会占用一整个上午。

segments.text: Man: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Man: Um, what do I need to bring?
segments.translation: 嗯，我需要带些什么？

segments.text: Assistant: Obviously, you have to bring your own camera.
segments.translation: 很显然，你得带上自己的相机。

segments.text: Assistant: Some people bring a lot of accessories like an extra lens, but there's really no need for this class.
segments.translation: 有些人会带很多配件，比如额外的镜头，但这门课其实真的用不着。

segments.text: Assistant: It's mainly focusing on composition really, and getting the most out of the basic camera.
segments.translation: 它主要讲的是构图，以及怎么把一台基础相机用到极致。

segments.text: Man: That's exactly what I want.
segments.translation: 这正是我想要的。

segments.text: Man: OK, then I've heard there's a class on cooking, right?
segments.translation: 好的，那我听说还有一门烹饪课，对吧？

segments.text: Assistant: Yes, it's called French cooking class.
segments.translation: 对，叫法式烹饪课。

segments.text: Assistant: As the name suggests, it will teach you cooking skills in French cuisine.
segments.translation: 顾名思义，它会教你法国菜的烹饪技巧。

segments.text: Man: Oh, great.
segments.translation: 哦，太好了。

segments.text: Man: Where will that be held?
segments.translation: 那门课在哪儿上呢？

segments.text: Assistant: This class is special, so we arrange it in a kitchen where we can get the necessary cooking equipment.
segments.translation: 这门课比较特殊，所以我们安排在一个厨房里，那里能有必要的烹饪设备。

segments.text: Assistant: Let me see, yes, the Anita Kitchen.
segments.translation: 我看看，对，是安妮塔厨房。

segments.text: Assistant: As for the time of the course, it used to be on the second Tuesday of every month, but there's a small adjustment this time.
segments.translation: 至于上课时间，以前是每个月第二个周二，不过这次有个小调整。

segments.text: Assistant: Although it's still held on a monthly basis, the exact time will be changed to the first Tuesday.
segments.translation: 虽然还是每月上一次，但具体时间会改到第一个周二。

segments.text: Man: Well, actually it's my wife who's really interested, and I think it's a good fit for her because our daughter has to take a guitar lesson every Tuesday, so my wife is available.
segments.translation: 其实真正感兴趣的是我太太，我觉得挺适合她的，因为我们女儿每周二都要上吉他课，所以我太太正好有空。

segments.text: Assistant: That's good.
segments.translation: 那挺好的。

segments.text: Assistant: But I have to remind you that aprons are not provided in this class, so when you do come, please bring one with you in case you get dirty when cooking.
segments.translation: 不过我得提醒您一下，这门课不提供围裙，所以来的时候请自己带一条，免得做饭时弄脏衣服。

segments.text: Assistant: What's more, don't forget to bring some money with you, as the ingredients for cooking, like vegetables or meat, have to be paid by yourself.
segments.translation: 另外，别忘了带点钱，因为做菜用的食材，比如蔬菜或肉，都得您自己出钱买。

segments.text: Man: OK, useful information to know.
segments.translation: 好的，这些信息很有用。

segments.text: Man: Then there's another class that my wife would like to join – that's the Beading class.
segments.translation: 然后还有一门课我太太想报——就是串珠课。

segments.text: Assistant: Oh, I've taken the class myself.
segments.translation: 哦，我自己上过这门课。

segments.text: Assistant: The tutor is excellent.
segments.translation: 那位老师特别棒。

segments.text: Assistant: Last term it was held in a tennis club, which is going to be redecorated soon, so we plan to change this class to a golf club this time.
segments.translation: 上学期是在一个网球俱乐部上的，那儿马上要重新装修了，所以这次我们打算把课改到一个高尔夫俱乐部。

segments.text: Assistant: And it'll be held on the evening of every Wednesday.
segments.translation: 课会在每周三晚上上。

segments.text: Man: Do I have to bring the beads with me?
segments.translation: 我需要自己带珠子吗？

segments.text: Assistant: Yes, that's the only material needed for this class.
segments.translation: 是的，那是这门课唯一要用到的材料。

segments.text: Man: OK, I think this class is also a good choice for her.
segments.translation: 好的，我觉得这门课对她来说也是个不错的选择。

segments.text: Man: Um, do you have any other classes that I can join?
segments.translation: 嗯，你们还有其他我能报的课吗？

segments.text: Assistant: If you like, I think you can take our Painting class.
segments.translation: 如果您愿意的话，我觉得您可以上我们的绘画课。

segments.text: Assistant: It's a popular class, so this term we're going to move it to a high school so that we get more room.
segments.translation: 这门课很受欢迎，所以这学期我们打算把它挪到一所高中去上，这样场地能大一些。

segments.text: Man: What time will it be?
segments.translation: 上课时间是什么时候？

segments.text: Assistant: It'll be on every Monday evening.
segments.translation: 在每周一晚上。

segments.text: Man: The time is good for me.
segments.translation: 这个时间对我挺合适。

segments.text: Man: Do I have to bring the paints?
segments.translation: 我需要自己带颜料吗？

segments.text: Assistant: Well, paints will be provided by the tutor, I know that.
segments.translation: 嗯，颜料会由老师提供，这个我知道。

segments.text: Assistant: Um, the information says you'll just need some brushes.
segments.translation: 嗯，资料上说你只需要带几支画笔就行。

segments.text: Man: I see.
segments.translation: 我明白了。

segments.text: Man: OK, just another question about the Beading class.
segments.translation: 好的，关于串珠课我还有个问题。

segments.text: Man: I've just remembered my wife asked me to find out the exact time – when will the first class begin?
segments.translation: 我刚想起来我太太让我问清楚具体时间——第一节课什么时候开始？

segments.text: Assistant: Well, the deadline for registration is April 30th, and we are not going to start the class until May 15th.
segments.translation: 嗯，报名截止日期是4月30日，我们要到5月15日才开课。

segments.text: Man: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Man: What's the fee for this class?
segments.translation: 这门课的费用是多少？

segments.text: Assistant: It was 95 dollars last term, but the cost will be a little more this term.
segments.translation: 上学期是95美元，不过这学期会稍微贵一点。

segments.text: Assistant: Well, let me check the details.
segments.translation: 嗯，我查一下具体情况。

segments.text: Assistant: OK, it'll be 100 dollars this term, just 5 dollars more.
segments.translation: 好的，这学期是100美元，就多了5美元。

segments.text: Man: Sounds reasonable.
segments.translation: 听起来挺合理的。

segments.text: Man: Then about the location.
segments.translation: 那再说说地点吧。

segments.text: Man: It's in the club, which room exactly?
segments.translation: 是在那个俱乐部里，具体是哪个房间？

segments.text: Assistant: Room J52.
segments.translation: J52房间。

segments.text: Man: OK, just one more question.
segments.translation: 好的，还有一个问题。

segments.text: Man: Is parking convenient?
segments.translation: 停车方便吗？

segments.text: Assistant: I'm sorry to tell you that parking space is only available for the club's premier members.
segments.translation: 很抱歉地告诉您，停车位只对俱乐部的高级会员开放。

segments.text: Assistant: But if you drive, there's a parking lot opposite the club, just beside the station.
segments.translation: 不过如果您开车来，俱乐部对面有个停车场，就在车站旁边。

segments.text: Assistant: You need to pay only a small parking fee.
segments.translation: 您只需付一点点停车费就行。

segments.text: Man: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Man: That's all I want to know.
segments.translation: 我想了解的就这些。

segments.text: Man: I'll call you later after I discuss it with my wife.
segments.translation: 我跟太太商量一下再给你们回电话。

segments.text: Man: Thank you very much.
segments.translation: 非常感谢。

segments.text: Assistant: You're welcome.
segments.translation: 不客气。

segments.text: Assistant: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！

segments.text: Man: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！
